title: Ford execs say they made a mistake when they replaced human engineers with AI
abstract: Ford execs say they made a mistake when they replaced human engineers with AI may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools...
abstract_zh: 福特高管们说：“我们用AI替代了人脑，结果有点蒙圈。”不过这工具真是专而准，就像拿着放大镜找蚊子，效率杠杠的！在瞬息万变的AI界，这种专注和精准可真是稀缺啊。
